titleStmt.title: SII 41.104: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 104. (A.R. No. 103 of 1905.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the east wall of the Erichchā-Uḍaiyār shrine in the Erichchā-Uḍaiyāar temple at Ambāsamudram.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya Māṟavarman Vikrama-pāṇḍya, Year 2 = c. 13th century A.D.

summary.p: In several pieces. Gift of 60 sheep to the temple of Tiruppōttuḍaiya-mahādēvar in Rājarājachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu by a local resident.

The other pieces seem to belong to some inscription(s) of the 11th century. One refers to a poliyūṭṭu gift of paddy by one Māḍalan Iḷayān Cheṭṭi of Vaḻakūr in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu of Chōḻamaṇḍalam for feeding pilgrims during Aśvati festival. Piece IV refers to a similar gift by a merchant of Kaḷakkuḍi-nāḍu to feed in Chōḻapāṇḍiyaṉ maḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tripuvaṉa
ccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkirama pāṇṭiyatevaṟ
kuyāṇṭu 2 Iraṇṭāvatumuḷḷināṭṭup pira
mateyam śrīrājarāca caturvetimaṅkalat
tutiruppottuṭaiyamahādevaṟkucan
tirātittaval celvatāka Ivvūr Eḻāñceri
t tirumiḻalaic caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ vaitta tirununtā viḷa
kkoṉṟukku viṭṭa Āṭu 6 10 Ivvāṭu Aṟupatumkaiyk
koṇṭu Ittirununtā viḷakkoṉṟum cantirātitta pakal
Erippitāṉom Akanāḻikai ceyvomikkoyili
lrakuṭamuṅ kuccikaiyuṅkoṇṭupukkaavarkaḷē
tirununtāviḷakkoṉṟumerippitāṉom
The slabs below this inscription are out of order and fragments. 11th century A.D.

Akanāḻikaiyom coḻamaṇṭalattu
ḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻunturnāṭṭu brahmateyam vaḻakūr māṭalaniḷaiyān ceṭṭiyāna maṉ
śvara nampi pakkal poliyūṭṭuk koṇṭa nel Aṟupatin kalam Innel
Aṟupatiṉ kalamum Ivar [ bhayikṣam] pukku Akanāḻikaiyom vayittaparicā
vatu Idadevar tirunāḷ Appikai Aśvatit tiruviḻā Ēḻunāḷum cevi
kka van=ta Aṭiyār nāṟ(p)patteṇṇāyiravarkkuṇṇa coḻapāṇṭiyan maṭattil U
ṇṇak kalattu vāy Āṇṭuvarai palicai nelp patakkāka Idadevar Eṇṇāḻikkā
l caṅkaranārāyaṇanāl Aṭṭuvatāṉa nel(p) patiṉan kalam Intanel pa
tiṉkalamum Ittirune ṇṭarum tiruvārāti

yil tēvar Eṇṇāḻikkāl caṅkaranārāyaṇa
tiṉ kalam Ine(l)p patiṉkalamum tiṟantu
ccamuṅkoṉum Akanāḻikaiyom
caip patiṉ kalamum Ittevarkku nāḻik
Āṇṭuvaraip palicai
ḷḷiṭṭa Akanāḻikaiyom

nīṟṟāṭiyum Ampalavaṉ tiruvārūraṉum
mavaccaṉakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Akanā[ ḻikai]
yom kaḷakkuṭi nāṭṭuk kuṭiyāṉ Ūyyakkoṇṭa coḻa
canviyāpāri pūlaṉcaṭaiyaṉāṉa Ēkacaṭaippaṭārar pakkal poliyū
ṭṭu Aṭṭuvatāka koṇṭa ṉel Aṟupatiṉkalamum Innel Aṟupati
ṉ kalamum Ivar bhayikṣakampukku Akanāḻikaiyom vacan=tan=taparicā

yvom Eṅkaḷ pakkal
vilai Oṟṟi taṉmatāṉam peṟṟuṭaiyāruñ can
tirātittapakal Erippārāka Ippaṭi cammatit
tuk kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Akanāḻi
kaiyom

tevarkku yāṇṭu
koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu
rājarājac caruppetimaṅkalattu
tiruppottu Uṭaiyār koyililu
bhai śrīmūlasthānamuṭaiyār
Digital edition of SII 41.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
